center.name: 内乌肯省
center.summary: 内乌肯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Chilean flicker、南方鸚鵡、Great shrike-tyrant等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The band-tailed earthcreeper is found in southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces and in the northeastern part of far southern Chile's Magallanes Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean flicker is found in central and southern Chile from the Coquimbo Region to central Magallanes Region and in adjacent southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A small population also exists in Neuquén Province, Argentina. The Chilean mockingbird inhabits a wide variety of biomes, most of which are characterized by scrub, shrubs, or widely spaced trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fortis is found in far southern Chile's Aysén and Magallanes regions and in southern Argentina from southern Neuquén Province south into Tierra del Fuego

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Magellanic tapaculo (Scytalopus magellanicus) is a small passerine bird in the tapaculo family Rhinocryptidae that is found in southern South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Patagonian forest earthcreeper is found in central Chile between Concepción and Valdivia provinces and in western Argentina between Neuquén and Chubut provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Steinbach's canastero is found in western Argentina from southern Salta Province south to Neuquén and Río Negro provinces.Areta, J.I., Hernández, I., Prieto, J., Delhey, K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found in southern Chile from the O'Higgins Region south to Aysén and in adjoining southwestern Argentina from Neuquén Province to northwestern Santa Cruz
